headline: Natural Quantum Crystals Found in Atacama Desert Mine
lede: Deep within an abandoned Atacama mine, geologists have identified high-purity Herbertsmithite crystals. These naturally occurring minerals offer a unique, scalable foundation for investigating quantum spin liquids that lab-grown samples struggle to replicate.

headline: Capturing Organic Texture Through Gaussian Splatting
lede: A high-fidelity 3D model of a strawberry demonstrates the precision of modern photogrammetry. By leveraging focus stacking and the slang-splat library, this project transforms complex macro imagery into a reusable digital asset.

headline: Interactive Geometry for the Classroom
lede: Polypad removes barriers to mathematical exploration with a suite of browser-based virtual manipulatives. Its integration of sonification allows students to visualize and hear abstract concepts in real time.

headline: Peter Neumann, Pioneer of System Security, Dies at Age
lede: The computing community reflects on the enduring legacy of Peter Neumann, a titan of systems reliability and moderator of the RISKS Digest. His work remains the definitive guide to understanding failure in complex digital environments.

headline: The Rapid Maturation of AI Coding Agents
lede: The last six months have redefined the role of AI in software engineering. As models evolve into reliable daily drivers, developers must navigate the balance between leveraging automated productivity and maintaining human oversight.
pullquote: The transition from experimental novelty to functional engineering tool defines the modern AI era.

headline: The Hidden Mechanics of Browser-Based Tracking
lede: The web experiment Click reveals the uncomfortable reality of granular user tracking. By monitoring mouse movements and interaction behaviors, contemporary sites capture a level of detail that challenges our standard expectations of privacy.

headline: Building a Portable Radio with Android Integration
lede: The kv4p HT project reimagines amateur radio by utilizing the smartphone as a powerful processing peripheral. This open-source build empowers makers to deploy a functional VHF or UHF transceiver with minimal hardware overhead.

headline: The Legacy of Netscape’s High-Speed Development
lede: Netscape Time defined the frantic, iterative pace of the nineties internet boom. This retrospective examines how that high-pressure environment fundamentally altered the culture of software engineering and open-source distribution.

headline: Mapping the Expanding PyTorch Ecosystem
lede: I The PyTorch Landscape serves as a vital directory for an increasingly fragmented machine learning field. By categorizing specialized libraries and frameworks, it provides researchers with the necessary taxonomy to navigate modern scientific computing.

headline: Composer 2.5 Enhances AI Coding Intelligence
lede: The latest release from Cursor improves complex instruction adherence through aggressive reinforcement learning. This update prioritizes practical coding utility by utilizing a twenty-five-fold increase in synthetic training data.
